examples: The most famouse of these dialects is Brummie.
Brummie James Laishley provides the view from Villa Park ahead of Monday's Barclays Premier League clash at Anfield.
Midlands English is one of the more stigmatized of English dialect groupings. The most famouse of these dialects is Brummie.
The Brummie comic's most recent success is the police spoof The Detectives, in which he co-stars with Robert Powell.
The children of Somalis growing up in Birmingham speak Brummie, not some Somali inflected version of English.
